title: filix-mas noveboracensis
intro: Filix-mas noveboracensis, also known as the New York fern, is a species of fern native to North America. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its rich content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Filix-mas noveboracensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, act as an antioxidant, and support immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Filix-mas noveboracensis include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
